name: my-brain
description: Second brain + always-on local dashboard for all your Claude Code, Cowork & Cursor work. Installs a login-start service on port 7717 that live-monitors sessions, sub-agents, tokens and 4-way data provenance, and self-enriches a file-based knowledge base via scheduled ULTRACODE research loops. Runs fully local; no hooks, no bundled MCP servers, no telemetry.
